    21→    </AppHeader>
    22→
    23→    <!-- Welcome Screen: shown on first load when no saved data exists -->
    24→    <div v-if="showWelcome" class="welcome-screen">
    25→      <div class="welcome-card">
    26→        <div class="welcome-icon">
    27→          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    28→            <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z" />
    29→            <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8" />
    30→            <line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13" />
    31→            <line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17" />
    32→            <polyline points="10 9 9 9 8 9" />
    33→          </svg>
    34→        </div>
    35→        <h2 class="welcome-headline">
    36→          Create professional documents in seconds
    37→        </h2>
    38→        <p class="welcome-description">
    39→          Write structured XML, pick a template, and instantly preview a polished document — ready to export.
    40→        </p>
    41→        <UButton
    42→          size="xl"
    43→          color="primary"
    44→          class="welcome-cta"
    45→          :loading="isSampleLoading"
    46→          @click="loadSample"
    47→        >
    48→          Start with a sample
    49→        </UButton>
    50→      </div>
    51→    </div>
    52→
    53→    <!-- Dual-panel layout: Editor (left) and Preview (right) -->
    54→    <div v-else class="dual-panel-layout">
    55→      <!-- Left Panel: XML Editor -->
    56→      <div class="editor-panel">
    57→        <XmlEditor
    58→          v-model="xmlContent"
    59→          height="100%"
    60→          width="100%"
    61→        />
    62→      </div>
    63→
    64→      <!-- Right Panel: Preview -->
    65→      <div class="preview-panel">
    66→        <PreviewPanel
    67→          :xml-content="debouncedXmlContent"
    68→          :zoom="1"
    69→        />
    70→      </div>
    71→    </div>
    72→  </div>
    73→</template>
    74→
    75→<script setup lang="ts">
    76→import { ref, watch, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'
    77→import { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'
    78→
    79→/**
    80→ * Main Application Page - MVP 6: Dual-Panel Integration
    81→ *
    82→ * Features:
    83→ * - Welcome screen on first load (no saved data in localStorage)
    84→ * - Dual-panel 50/50 layout (CSS Grid)
    85→ * - 300ms debounced real-time updates (per DECISIONS.md)
    86→ * - Persists XML content to localStorage
    87→ * - Minimum 1024px responsive design
    88→ * - Document type switching loads the appropriate sample XML
    89→ */
    90→
    91→const LS_KEY = 'ohmydoc_xml_content'
    92→
    93→function handlePrint() {
    94→  window.print()
    95→}
    96→
    97→const { activeDocumentType, currentDocumentType } = useDocumentType()
    98→
    99→// Set page metadata
   100→useHead({
   101→  title: 'OhMyDoc - XML to HTML Transformer',
   102→})
   103→
   104→// Welcome screen is shown when no saved data exists
   105→const showWelcome = ref(true)
   106→const isSampleLoading = ref(false)
   107→
   108→// Reactive state for XML content
   109→const xmlContent = ref('')
   110→const debouncedXmlContent = ref('')
   111→
   112→// Debounce timer ref
   113→let debounceTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
   114→
   115→/**
   116→ * Debounce watcher: Updates preview 300ms after user stops typing
   117→ * Per DECISIONS.md Decision 5: 300ms < 500ms threshold provides smooth UX
   118→ * without feeling laggy or causing excessive re-parsing
   119→ */
   120→watch(xmlContent, (newValue) => {
   121→  if (debounceTimer) {
   122→    clearTimeout(debounceTimer)
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   126→    debouncedXmlContent.value = newValue
   127→    // Persist to localStorage so returning users skip the welcome screen
   128→    try {
   129→      localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, newValue)
   130→    }
   131→    catch {
   132→      // Ignore storage errors (private browsing, quota exceeded, etc.)
   133→    }
   134→  }, 300)
   135→})
   136→
   137→/**
   138→ * Fetch and apply the sample XML for the active document type.
   139→ * Called by the "Start with a sample" button and when switching document types.
   140→ */
   141→async function loadSample() {
   142→  isSampleLoading.value = true
   143→  const samplePath = currentDocumentType.value?.sampleXmlPath ?? '/samples/cover-letter.xml'
   144→  try {
   145→    const response = await fetch(samplePath)
   146→    if (!response.ok) {
   147→      throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`)
   148→    }
   149→    const sampleXml = await response.text()
   150→    xmlContent.value = sampleXml
   151→    debouncedXmlContent.value = sampleXml
   152→    showWelcome.value = false
   153→  }
   154→  catch (error) {
   155→    console.error('Error loading sample XML:', error)
   156→    // Still dismiss welcome and show an empty editor rather than getting stuck
   157→    showWelcome.value = false
   158→  }
   159→  finally {
   160→    isSampleLoading.value = false
   161→  }
   162→}
   163→
   164→/**
   165→ * When the user switches document type from the header dropdown, load the
   166→ * sample XML for the newly selected type so there's always a valid document
   167→ * to preview. Only fires on explicit user action (not on initial page load).
   168→ */
   169→watch(activeDocumentType, () => {
   170→  if (!showWelcome.value) {
   171→    loadSample()
   172→  }
   173→}, { immediate: false })
   174→
   175→/**
   176→ * On mount: restore saved content from localStorage.
   177→ * If content exists, skip the welcome screen and load it directly.
   178→ */
   179→onMounted(() => {
   180→  try {
   181→    const saved = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY)
   182→    if (saved) {
   183→      xmlContent.value = saved
   184→      debouncedXmlContent.value = saved
   185→      showWelcome.value = false
   186→    }
   187→  }
   188→  catch {
   189→    // Ignore localStorage errors; welcome screen will show as default
   190→  }
   191→})
   192→
   193→/**
   194→ * Cleanup: Clear debounce timer on component unmount
   195→ */
   196→onUnmounted(() => {
   197→  if (debounceTimer) {
   198→    clearTimeout(debounceTimer)
   199→  }
   200→})
   201→</script>
   202→
   203→<style scoped>
   204→/**
   205→ * Main app container - full viewport height
   206→ */
   207→.app-container {
   208→  display: flex;
   209→  flex-direction: column;
   210→  height: 100vh;
   211→  width: 100vw;
   212→  overflow: hidden;
   213→}
   214→
   215→/**
   216→ * Dual-panel layout using CSS Grid
   217→ * 50/50 split between editor (left) and preview (right)
   218→ * Minimum width: 1024px total (512px per panel)
   219→ */
   220→.dual-panel-layout {
   221→  display: grid;
   222→  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
   223→  flex: 1;
   224→  min-height: 0;
   225→  gap: 0;
   226→
   227→  /* Minimum width constraint */
   228→  min-width: 1024px;
   229→}
   230→
   231→/**
   232→ * Left panel: XML Editor
   233→ * Full height, scrollable if needed
   234→ */
   235→.editor-panel {
   236→  display: flex;
   237→  flex-direction: column;
   238→  overflow: hidden;
   239→  background-color: #1e1e1e; /* Dark editor background */
   240→  border-right: 1px solid var(--color-gray-200);
   241→  transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
   242→}
   243→
   244→/**
   245→ * Right panel: Preview
   246→ * Full height, scrollable if needed
   247→ */
   248→.preview-panel {
   249→  display: flex;
   250→  flex-direction: column;
   251→  overflow: auto;
   252→  background-color: var(--color-gray-50);
   253→  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;
   254→}
   255→
   256→/**
   257→ * Print: hide all editor chrome, show only the preview document
   258→ *
   259→ * - Hide header (dropdowns, buttons, title)
   260→ * - Hide the XML editor panel
   261→ * - Collapse the dual-panel grid to a single column
   262→ * - Let the preview fill the full printable area
   263→ * - @page margin (in app.vue) provides the physical page margins
   264→ */
   265→@media print {
   266→  .app-container {
   267→    display: block;
   268→    height: auto;
   269→    overflow: visible;
   270→  }
   271→
   272→  /* Hide entire app header (title, type/template dropdowns, export button) */
   273→  .app-header {
   274→    display: none;
   275→  }
   276→
   277→  /* Hide the XML editor */
   278→  .editor-panel {
   279→    display: none;
   280→  }
   281→
   282→  /* Collapse the two-column grid; let preview fill the page */
   283→  .dual-panel-layout {
   284→    display: block;
   285→    min-width: unset;
   286→  }
   287→
   288→  /* Strip the preview wrapper background so only the document shows */
   289→  .preview-panel {
   290→    background: transparent;
   291→  }
   292→
   293→  /* Hide the welcome screen if visible */
   294→  .welcome-screen {
   295→    display: none;
   296→  }
   297→}
   298→
   299→/**
   300→ * Responsive design for smaller screens
   301→ * Stack panels vertically below 1024px
   302→ */
   303→@media (max-width: 1024px) {
   304→  .dual-panel-layout {
   305→    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
   306→    grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr;
   307→    min-width: unset;
   308→  }
   309→
   310→  .editor-panel {
   311→    border-right: none;
   312→    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300);
   313→  }
   314→}
   315→
   316→/**
   317→ * Welcome screen - shown on first load
   318→ */
   319→.welcome-screen {
   320→  flex: 1;
   321→  display: flex;
   322→  align-items: center;
   323→  justify-content: center;
   324→  background-color: var(--color-gray-50);
   325→  padding: 2rem;
   326→}
   327→
   328→.welcome-card {
   329→  display: flex;
   330→  flex-direction: column;
   331→  align-items: center;
   332→  text-align: center;
   333→  max-width: 480px;
   334→  gap: 1.25rem;
   335→}
   336→
   337→.welcome-icon {
   338→  color: var(--color-primary-500, #0f6fec);
   339→  opacity: 0.85;
   340→}
   341→
   342→.welcome-headline {
   343→  font-size: 1.75rem;
   344→  font-weight: 700;
   345→  line-height: 1.25;
   346→  color: var(--color-gray-900);
   347→  margin: 0;
   348→}
   349→
   350→.welcome-description {
   351→  font-size: 1rem;
   352→  line-height: 1.6;
   353→  color: var(--color-gray-600);
   354→  margin: 0;
   355→}
   356→
   357→.welcome-cta {
   358→  margin-top: 0.5rem;
   359→}
   360→</style>
   361→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

full viewport height\n   206\u2192 */\n   207\u2192.app-container {\n   208\u2192  display: flex;\n   209\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   210\u2192  height: 100vh;\n   211\u2192  width: 100vw;\n   212\u2192  overflow: hidden;\n   213\u2192}\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192/**\n   216\u2192 * Dual-panel layout using CSS Grid\n   217\u2192 * 50/50 split between editor (left) and preview (right)\n   218\u2192 * Minimum width: 1024px total (512px per panel)\n   219\u2192 */\n   220\u2192.dual-panel-layout {\n   221\u2192  display: grid;\n   222\u2192  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n   223\u2192  flex: 1;\n   224\u2192  min-height: 0;\n   225\u2192  gap: 0;\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192  /* Minimum width constraint */\n   228\u2192  min-width: 1024px;\n   229\u2192}\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192/**\n   232\u2192 * Left panel: XML Editor\n   233\u2192 * Full height, scrollable if needed\n   234\u2192 */\n   235\u2192.editor-panel {\n   236\u2192  display: flex;\n   237\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   238\u2192  overflow: hidden;\n   239\u2192  background-color: #1e1e1e; /* Dark editor background */\n   240\u2192  border-right: 1px solid var(--color-gray-200);\n   241\u2192  transition: border-color 0.15s ease;\n   242\u2192}\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192/**\n   245\u2192 * Right panel: Preview\n   246\u2192 * Full height, scrollable if needed\n   247\u2192 */\n   248\u2192.preview-panel {\n   249\u2192  display: flex;\n   250\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   251\u2192  overflow: auto;\n   252\u2192  background-color: var(--color-gray-50);\n   253\u2192  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;\n   254\u2192}\n   255\u2192\n   256\u2192/**\n   257\u2192 * Print: hide all editor chrome, show only the preview document\n   258\u2192 *\n   259\u2192 * - Hide header (dropdowns, buttons, title)\n   260\u2192 * - Hide the XML editor panel\n   261\u2192 * - Collapse the dual-panel grid to a single column\n   262\u2192 * - Let the preview fill the full printable area\n   263\u2192 * - @page margin (in app.vue) provides the physical page margins\n   264\u2192 */\n   265\u2192@media print {\n   266\u2192  .app-container {\n   267\u2192    display: block;\n   268\u2192    height: auto;\n   269\u2192    overflow: visible;\n   270\u2192  }\n   271\u2192\n   272\u2192  /* Hide entire app header (title, type/template dropdowns, export button) */\n   273\u2192  .app-header {\n   274\u2192    display: none;\n   275\u2192  }\n   276\u2192\n   277\u2192  /* Hide the XML editor */\n   278\u2192  .editor-panel {\n   279\u2192    display: none;\n   280\u2192  }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192  /* Collapse the two-column grid; let preview fill the page */\n   283\u2192  .dual-panel-layout {\n   284\u2192    display: block;\n   285\u2192    min-width: unset;\n   286\u2192  }\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192  /* Strip the preview wrapper background so only the document shows */\n   289\u2192  .preview-panel {\n   290\u2192    background: transparent;\n   291\u2192  }\n   292\u2192\n   293\u2192  /* Hide the welcome screen if visible */\n   294\u2192  .welcome-screen {\n   295\u2192    display: none;\n   296\u2192  }\n   297\u2192}\n   298\u2192\n   299\u2192/**\n   300\u2192 * Responsive design for smaller screens\n   301\u2192 * Stack panels vertically below 1024px\n   302\u2192 */\n   303\u2192@media (max-width: 1024px) {\n   304\u2192  .dual-panel-layout {\n   305\u2192    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n   306\u2192    grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr;\n   307\u2192    min-width: unset;\n   308\u2192  }\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192  .editor-panel {\n   311\u2192    border-right: none;\n   312\u2192    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-gray-300);\n   313\u2192  }\n   314\u2192}\n   315\u2192\n   316\u2192/**\n   317\u2192 * Welcome screen - shown on first load\n   318\u2192 */\n   319\u2192.welcome-screen {\n   320\u2192  flex: 1;\n   321\u2192  display: flex;\n   322\u2192  align-items: center;\n   323\u2192  justify-content: center;\n   324\u2192  background-color: var(--color-gray-50);\n   325\u2192  padding: 2rem;\n   326\u2192}\n   327\u2192\n   328\u2192.welcome-card {\n   329\u2192  display: flex;\n   330\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   331\u2192  align-items: center;\n   332\u2192  text-align: center;\n   333\u2192  max-width: 480px;\n   334\u2192  gap: 1.25rem;\n   335\u2192}\n   336\u2192\n   337\u2192.welcome-icon {\n   338\u2192  color: var(--color-primary-500, #0f6fec);\n   339\u2192  opacity: 0.85;\n   340\u2192}\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192.welcome-headline {\n   343\u2192  font-size: 1.75rem;\n   344\u2192  font-weight: 700;\n   345\u2192  line-height: 1.25;\n   346\u2192  color: var(--color-gray-900);\n   347\u2192  margin: 0;\n   348\u2192}\n   349\u2192\n   350\u2192.welcome-description {\n   351\u2192  font-size: 1rem;\n   352\u2192  line-height: 1.6;\n   353\u2192  color: var(--color-gray-600);\n   354\u2192  margin: 0;\n   355\u2192}\n   356\u2192\n   357\u2192.welcome-cta {\n   358\u2192  margin-top: 0.5rem;\n   359\u2192}\n   360\u2192</style>\n   361\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     1→<template>
     2→  <UContainer class="app-header border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800">
     3→    <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
     4→      <!-- Left action slot for future buttons (Format, Clear, Import - MVP 8) -->
     5→      <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
     6→        <slot name="left-actions" />
     7→      </div>
     8→
     9→      <!-- App Title -->
    10→      <div class="text-center">
    11→        <h1 class="text-sm font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-900 dark:text-white">
    12→          OhMyDoc
    13→        </h1>
    14→      </div>
    15→
    16→      <!-- Right: Document type + template switchers + action slot -->
    17→      <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
    18→        <!-- Document Type Dropdown -->
    19→        <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
    20→          <label class="text-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">Type</label>
    21→          <USelectMenu
    22→            v-model="selectedDocumentType"
    23→            :items="documentTypeOptions"
    24→            value-key="value"
    25→            label-key="label"
    26→            size="xs"
    27→            class="w-36"
    28→          />
    29→        </div>
    30→
    31→        <!-- Template Selector (visual preview cards) -->
    32→        <TemplateSelector />
    33→
    34→        <slot name="right-actions" />
    35→      </div>
    36→    </div>
    37→  </UContainer>
    38→</template>
    39→
    40→<style scoped>
    41→.app-header {
    42→  padding-top: 0.5rem;
    43→  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    44→}
    45→</style>
    46→
    47→<script setup lang="ts">
    48→import { computed } from 'vue'
    49→import { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'
    50→
    51→const { activeDocumentType, setActiveDocumentType, getAvailableDocumentTypes } = useDocumentType()
    52→
    53→// Document type options (static — registry doesn't change at runtime)
    54→const documentTypeOptions = getAvailableDocumentTypes().map(d => ({ label: d.displayName, value: d.name }))
    55→
    56→const selectedDocumentType = computed({
    57→  get: () => activeDocumentType.value,
    58→  set: (val: string) => setActiveDocumentType(val),
    59→})
    60→</script>
    61→

USERMESSAGE #29
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→/**
     2→ * Template System Composable
     3→ *
     4→ * Provides reactive template selection and management for document rendering.
     5→ * Active template is shared across all components via useState and persisted
     6→ * to localStorage so the selection survives page reloads.
     7→ */
     8→
     9→import { onMounted, computed } from 'vue'
    10→import type { Component } from 'vue'
    11→import CoverLetterModern from '~/templates/modern/CoverLetterModern.vue'
    12→import CoverLetterClassic from '~/templates/classic/CoverLetterClassic.vue'
    13→import CoverLetterMinimal from '~/templates/minimal/CoverLetterMinimal.vue'
    14→import CoverLetterExecutive from '~/templates/executive/CoverLetterExecutive.vue'
    15→import CoverLetterCreative from '~/templates/creative/CoverLetterCreative.vue'
    16→import ResignationProfessional from '~/templates/resignation-professional/ResignationProfessional.vue'
    17→import ResignationBrief from '~/templates/resignation-brief/ResignationBrief.vue'
    18→
    19→const LS_KEY = 'ohmydoc_template'
    20→
    21→// Template metadata interface
    22→export interface TemplateMetadata {
    23→  name: string
    24→  displayName: string
    25→  description: string
    26→  /** Document type names this template supports (matches DocumentTypeConfig.name) */
    27→  documentTypes: string[]
    28→}
    29→
    30→// Template registry type
    31→export interface TemplateRegistry {
    32→  [key: string]: {
    33→    component: Component
    34→    metadata: TemplateMetadata
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→/**
    39→ * Template Registry
    40→ *
    41→ * Maps template names to their Vue components and metadata.
    42→ * All templates use the same ParsedData props interface for consistency.
    43→ */
    44→const templates: TemplateRegistry = {
    45→  modern: {
    46→    component: CoverLetterModern,
    47→    metadata: {
    48→      name: 'modern',
    49→      displayName: 'Modern',
    50→      description: 'Professional cover letter template with modern styling and clean typography',
    51→      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],
    52→    },
    53→  },
    54→  classic: {
    55→    component: CoverLetterClassic,
    56→    metadata: {
    57→      name: 'classic',
    58→      displayName: 'Classic',
    59→      description: 'Traditional cover letter with table-based layout and formal styling',
    60→      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],
    61→    },
    62→  },
    63→  minimal: {
    64→    component: CoverLetterMinimal,
    65→    metadata: {
    66→      name: 'minimal',
    67→      displayName: 'Minimal',
    68→      description: 'Clean, minimalist cover letter design with simple structure and generous whitespace',
    69→      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],
    70→    },
    71→  },
    72→  executive: {
    73→    component: CoverLetterExecutive,
    74→    metadata: {
    75→      name: 'executive',
    76→      displayName: 'Executive',
    77→      description: 'Bold, confident serif template with navy accent, large name treatment, and horizontal rule dividers',
    78→      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],
    79→    },
    80→  },
    81→  creative: {
    82→    component: CoverLetterCreative,
    83→    metadata: {
    84→      name: 'creative',
    85→      displayName: 'Creative',
    86→      description: 'Two-column layout with vibrant accent sidebar — designed for designers, creatives, and marketers',
    87→      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],
    88→    },
    89→  },
    90→  'resignation-professional': {
    91→    component: ResignationProfessional,
    92→    metadata: {
    93→      name: 'resignation-professional',
    94→      displayName: 'Professional',
    95→      description: 'Formal letterhead layout with sender top-left, date top-right, and clean typography',
    96→      documentTypes: ['resignation-letter'],
    97→    },
    98→  },
    99→  'resignation-brief': {
   100→    component: ResignationBrief,
   101→    metadata: {
   102→      name: 'resignation-brief',
   103→      displayName: 'Brief',
   104→      description: 'Compact, minimal resignation letter with just the essentials',
   105→      documentTypes: ['resignation-letter'],
   106→    },
   107→  },
   108→}
   109→
   110→/**
   111→ * Composable function to use the reactive template system in Vue components.
   112→ *
   113→ * Active template state is shared across all component instances via useState.
   114→ * On mount, the saved localStorage value is restored (client-side only).
   115→ *
   116→ * @returns Reactive template state and control functions
   117→ */
   118→export function useTemplate() {
   119→  // Shared reactive state — useState ensures all components see the same value
   120→  const activeTemplate = useState<string>('activeTemplate', () => 'modern')
   121→
   122→  // Restore from localStorage after hydration (client-only, runs once per component mount)
   123→  onMounted(() => {
   124→    try {
   125→      const saved = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY)
   126→      if (saved && templates[saved]) {
   127→        activeTemplate.value = saved
   128→      }
   129→    }
   130→    catch {
   131→      // Ignore storage errors (private browsing, quota exceeded, etc.)
   132→    }
   133→  })
   134→
   135→  /**
   136→   * Switch to a different template and persist the choice to localStorage.
   137→   */
   138→  function setActiveTemplate(name: string) {
   139→    if (!templates[name]) {
   140→      console.warn(`Template "${name}" not found. Available: ${Object.keys(templates).join(', ')}`)
   141→      return
   142→    }
   143→    activeTemplate.value = name
   144→    try {
   145→      localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, name)
   146→    }
   147→    catch {
   148→      // Ignore storage errors
   149→    }
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  /** Reactive component for the currently active template */
   153→  const currentTemplate = computed<Component | undefined>(
   154→    () => templates[activeTemplate.value]?.component,
   155→  )
   156→
   157→  /** Metadata for the currently active template */
   158→  const currentTemplateMetadata = computed<TemplateMetadata | undefined>(
   159→    () => templates[activeTemplate.value]?.metadata,
   160→  )
   161→
   162→  /** Names of all registered templates */
   163→  function getAvailableTemplates(): string[] {
   164→    return Object.keys(templates)
   165→  }
   166→
   167→  /** Metadata objects for all registered templates */
   168→  function getAllTemplateMetadata(): TemplateMetadata[] {
   169→    return Object.values(templates).map(t => t.metadata)
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  /** Metadata objects for templates that support the given document type */
   173→  function getTemplatesForDocumentType(docType: string): TemplateMetadata[] {
   174→    return Object.values(templates)
   175→      .filter(t => t.metadata.documentTypes.includes(docType))
   176→      .map(t => t.metadata)
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return {
   180→    activeTemplate,
   181→    setActiveTemplate,
   182→    currentTemplate,
   183→    currentTemplateMetadata,
   184→    getAvailableTemplates,
   185→    getAllTemplateMetadata,
   186→    getTemplatesForDocumentType,
   187→  }
   188→}
   189→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

with table-based layout and formal styling',\n    60\u2192      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],\n    61\u2192    },\n    62\u2192  },\n    63\u2192  minimal: {\n    64\u2192    component: with simple structure and generous whitespace',\n    69\u2192      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],\n    70\u2192    },\n    71\u2192  },\n    72\u2192  executive: {\n    73\u2192    component: CoverLetterExecutive,\n    74\u2192    metadata: {\n    75\u2192      name: 'executive',\n    76\u2192      displayName: 'Executive',\n    77\u2192      description: 'Bold, confident serif template with navy accent, large name treatment, and horizontal rule dividers',\n    78\u2192      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],\n    79\u2192    },\n    80\u2192  },\n    81\u2192  creative: {\n    82\u2192    component: CoverLetterCreative,\n    83\u2192    metadata: {\n    84\u2192      name: 'creative',\n    85\u2192      displayName: 'Creative',\n    86\u2192      description: 'Two-column layout with vibrant accent sidebar \u2014 designed for designers, creatives, and marketers',\n    87\u2192      documentTypes: ['cover-letter'],\n    88\u2192    },\n    89\u2192  },\n    90\u2192  'resignation-professional': {\n    91\u2192    component: ResignationProfessional,\n    92\u2192    metadata: {\n    93\u2192      name: 'resignation-professional',\n    94\u2192      displayName: 'Professional',\n    95\u2192      description: 'Formal letterhead layout with sender top-left, date top-right, and clean typography',\n    96\u2192      documentTypes: ['resignation-letter'],\n    97\u2192    },\n    98\u2192  },\n    99\u2192  'resignation-brief': {\n   100\u2192    component: ResignationBrief,\n   101\u2192    metadata: {\n   102\u2192      name: 'resignation-brief',\n   103\u2192      displayName: 'Brief',\n   104\u2192      description: 'Compact, minimal resignation letter with just the essentials',\n   105\u2192      documentTypes: ['resignation-letter'],\n   106\u2192    },\n   107\u2192  },\n   108\u2192}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192/**\n   111\u2192 * Composable function to use the reactive template system in Vue components.\n   112\u2192 *\n   113\u2192 * Active template state is shared across all component instances via useState.\n   114\u2192 * On mount, the saved localStorage value is restored (client-side only).\n   115\u2192 *\n   116\u2192 * @returns Reactive template state and control functions\n   117\u2192 */\n   118\u2192export function useTemplate() {\n   119\u2192  // Shared reactive state \u2014 useState ensures all components see the same value\n   120\u2192  const activeTemplate = useState<string>('activeTemplate', () => 'modern')\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192  // Restore from localStorage after hydration (client-only, runs once per component mount)\n   123\u2192  onMounted(() => {\n   124\u2192    try {\n   125\u2192      const saved = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY)\n   126\u2192      if (saved && templates[saved]) {\n   127\u2192        activeTemplate.value = saved\n   128\u2192      }\n   129\u2192    }\n   130\u2192    catch {\n   131\u2192      // Ignore storage errors (private browsing, quota exceeded, etc.)\n   132\u2192    }\n   133\u2192  })\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192  /**\n   136\u2192   * Switch to a different template and persist the choice to localStorage.\n   137\u2192   */\n   138\u2192  function setActiveTemplate(name: string) {\n   139\u2192    if (!templates[name]) {\n   140\u2192      console.warn(`Template \"${name}\" not found. Available: ${Object.keys(templates).join(', ')}`)\n   141\u2192      return\n   142\u2192    }\n   143\u2192    activeTemplate.value = name\n   144\u2192    try {\n   145\u2192      localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, name)\n   146\u2192    }\n   147\u2192    catch {\n   148\u2192      // Ignore storage errors\n   149\u2192    }\n   150\u2192  }\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192  /** Reactive component for the currently active template */\n   153\u2192  const currentTemplate = computed<Component | undefined>(\n   154\u2192    () => templates[activeTemplate.value]?.component,\n   155\u2192  )\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192  /** Metadata for the currently active template */\n   158\u2192  const currentTemplateMetadata = computed<TemplateMetadata | undefined>(\n   159\u2192    () => templates[activeTemplate.value]?.metadata,\n   160\u2192  )\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192  /** Names of all registered templates */\n   163\u2192  function getAvailableTemplates(): string[] {\n   164\u2192    return Object.keys(templates)\n   165\u2192  }\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192  /** Metadata objects for all registered templates */\n   168\u2192  function getAllTemplateMetadata(): TemplateMetadata[] {\n   169\u2192    return Object.values(templates).map(t => t.metadata)\n   170\u2192  }\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192  /** Metadata objects for templates that support the given document type */\n   173\u2192  function getTemplatesForDocumentType(docType: string): TemplateMetadata[] {\n   174\u2192    return Object.values(templates)\n   175\u2192      .filter(t => t.metadata.documentTypes.includes(docType))\n   176\u2192      .map(t => t.metadata)\n   177\u2192  }\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192  return {\n   180\u2192    activeTemplate,\n   181\u2192    setActiveTemplate,\n   182\u2192    currentTemplate,\n   183\u2192    currentTemplateMetadata,\n   184\u2192    getAvailableTemplates,\n   185\u2192    getAllTemplateMetadata,\n   186\u2192    getTemplatesForDocumentType,\n   187\u2192  }\n   188\u2192}\n   189\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     1→<template>
     2→  <div ref="wrapperRef" class="ts-wrapper">
     3→    <!-- Trigger button — styled to match UButton outline xs -->
     4→    <button class="ts-trigger" :class="{ 'ts-trigger--open': isOpen }" @click="isOpen = !isOpen">
     5→      <UIcon name="i-lucide-layout-template" class="ts-icon" />
     6→      <span>{{ currentTemplateMetadata?.displayName ?? 'Template' }}</span>
     7→      <UIcon name="i-lucide-chevron-down" class="ts-chevron" :class="{ 'ts-chevron--open': isOpen }" />
     8→    </button>
     9→
    10→    <!-- Dropdown panel -->
    11→    <div v-if="isOpen" class="ts-panel">
    12→      <p class="ts-heading">Choose template</p>
    13→      <div class="ts-grid">
    14→        <button
    15→          v-for="tmpl in templates"
    16→          :key="tmpl.name"
    17→          class="ts-card"
    18→          :class="{ 'ts-card--active': tmpl.name === activeTemplate }"
    19→          :title="tmpl.description"
    20→          @click="select(tmpl.name)"
    21→        >
    22→          <!-- CSS layout sketch -->
    23→          <div class="ts-sketch" :class="`sketch-${tmpl.name}`">
    24→            <template v-if="tmpl.name === 'modern'">
    25→              <div class="sk-bar" />
    26→              <div class="sk-name" />
    27→              <div class="sk-sub" />
    28→              <div class="sk-lines" />
    29→            </template>
    30→
    31→            <template v-else-if="tmpl.name === 'classic'">
    32→              <div class="sk-header-box">
    33→                <div class="sk-name-c" />
    34→                <div class="sk-sub-c" />
    35→              </div>
    36→              <div class="sk-rule" />
    37→              <div class="sk-lines" />
    38→            </template>
    39→
    40→            <template v-else-if="tmpl.name === 'minimal'">
    41→              <div class="sk-name" />
    42→              <div class="sk-thin-rule" />
    43→              <div class="sk-lines" />
    44→            </template>
    45→
    46→            <template v-else-if="tmpl.name === 'executive'">
    47→              <div class="sk-navy-block">
    48→                <div class="sk-name-white" />
    49→              </div>
    50→              <div class="sk-rule" />
    51→              <div class="sk-lines" />
    52→            </template>
    53→
    54→            <template v-else-if="tmpl.name === 'creative'">
    55→              <div class="sk-sidebar">
    56→                <div class="sk-side-name" />
    57→                <div class="sk-side-lines" />
    58→              </div>
    59→              <div class="sk-main">
    60→                <div class="sk-name" />
    61→                <div class="sk-lines" />
    62→              </div>
    63→            </template>
    64→
    65→            <template v-else-if="tmpl.name === 'resignation-professional'">
    66→              <div class="sk-sender" />
    67→              <div class="sk-date" />
    68→              <div class="sk-recipient" />
    69→              <div class="sk-lines" />
    70→            </template>
    71→
    72→            <template v-else-if="tmpl.name === 'resignation-brief'">
    73→              <div class="sk-name-c" />
    74→              <div class="sk-thin-rule" />
    75→              <div class="sk-lines" />
    76→            </template>
    77→          </div>
    78→
    79→          <span class="ts-card-name">{{ tmpl.displayName }}</span>
    80→        </button>
    81→      </div>
    82→    </div>
    83→  </div>
    84→</template>
    85→
    86→<script setup lang="ts">
    87→import { ref, computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'
    88→import { useTemplate } from '~/composables/useTemplate'
    89→import { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'
    90→
    91→const { activeTemplate, setActiveTemplate, getTemplatesForDocumentType, currentTemplateMetadata } = useTemplate()
    92→const { activeDocumentType } = useDocumentType()
    93→
    94→const isOpen = ref(false)
    95→const wrapperRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    96→
    97→const templates = computed(() => getTemplatesForDocumentType(activeDocumentType.value))
    98→
    99→function select(name: string) {
   100→  setActiveTemplate(name)
   101→  isOpen.value = false
   102→}
   103→
   104→function onDocumentClick(event: MouseEvent) {
   105→  if (wrapperRef.value && !wrapperRef.value.contains(event.target as Node)) {
   106→    isOpen.value = false
   107→  }
   108→}
   109→
   110→onMounted(() => document.addEventListener('mousedown', onDocumentClick))
   111→onUnmounted(() => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onDocumentClick))
   112→</script>
   113→
   114→<style scoped>
   115→/* ── Wrapper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   116→
   117→.ts-wrapper {
   118→  position: relative;
   119→  display: inline-block;
   120→}
   121→
   122→/* ── Trigger ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   123→
   124→.ts-trigger {
   125→  display: inline-flex;
   126→  align-items: center;
   127→  gap: 5px;
   128→  padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem;
   129→  font-size: 0.75rem;
   130→  font-weight: 500;
   131→  line-height: 1.25rem;
   132→  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
   133→  border-radius: 0.375rem;
   134→  background: transparent;
   135→  color: #374151;
   136→  cursor: pointer;
   137→  transition: background-color 0.1s, border-color 0.1s;
   138→  white-space: nowrap;
   139→}
   140→
   141→.ts-trigger:hover,
   142→.ts-trigger--open {
   143→  background: #f9fafb;
   144→  border-color: #d1d5db;
   145→}
   146→
   147→.ts-icon {
   148→  width: 13px;
   149→  height: 13px;
   150→  opacity: 0.7;
   151→  flex-shrink: 0;
   152→}
   153→
   154→.ts-chevron {
   155→  width: 11px;
   156→  height: 11px;
   157→  opacity: 0.5;
   158→  flex-shrink: 0;
   159→  transition: transform 0.15s;
   160→}
   161→
   162→.ts-chevron--open {
   163→  transform: rotate(180deg);
   164→}
   165→
   166→/* ── Panel ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   167→
   168→.ts-panel {
   169→  position: absolute;
   170→  right: 0;
   171→  top: calc(100% + 6px);
   172→  z-index: 50;
   173→  padding: 12px;
   174→  min-width: 292px;
   175→  background: #fff;
   176→  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
   177→  border-radius: 0.5rem;
   178→  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
   179→}
   180→
   181→.ts-heading {
   182→  font-size: 10px;
   183→  font-weight: 600;
   184→  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
   185→  text-transform: uppercase;
   186→  color: #9ca3af;
   187→  margin: 0 0 10px 0;
   188→}
   189→
   190→/* ── Card grid ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   191→
   192→.ts-grid {
   193→  display: grid;
   194→  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
   195→  gap: 8px;
   196→}
   197→
   198→/* ── Individual card ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   199→
   200→.ts-card {
   201→  display: flex;
   202→  flex-direction: column;
   203→  align-items: center;
   204→  gap: 6px;
   205→  padding: 7px;
   206→  border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
   207→  border-radius: 8px;
   208→  background: #fff;
   209→  cursor: pointer;
   210→  transition: border-color 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease;
   211→  text-align: center;
   212→}
   213→
   214→.ts-card:hover {
   215→  border-color: #9ca3af;
   216→  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
   217→}
   218→
   219→.ts-card--active {
   220→  border-color: #0f6fec;
   221→  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #0f6fec;
   222→}
   223→
   224→.ts-card-name {
   225→  font-size: 10px;
   226→  font-weight: 500;
   227→  color: #4b5563;
   228→  line-height: 1;
   229→}
   230→
   231→.ts-card--active .ts-card-name {
   232→  color: #0f6fec;
   233→  font-weight: 600;
   234→}
   235→
   236→/* ── Sketch container ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
   237→
   238→.ts-sketch {
   239→  width: 72px;
   240→  height: 88px;
   241→  border-radius: 3px;
   242→  overflow: hidden;
   243→  position: relative;
   244→  background: #fff;
   245→  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
   246→  flex-shrink: 0;
   247→}
   248→
   249→/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   250→   SHARED SKETCH PRIMITIVES
   251→   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
   252→
   253→.sk-name {
   254→  position: absolute;
   255→  border-radius: 1px;
   256→  background: #374151;
   257→}
   258→
   259→.sk-sub {
   260→  position: absolute;
   261→  border-radius: 1px;
   262→  background: #9ca3af;
   263→}
   264→
   265→.sk-rule {
   266→  position: absolute;
   267→  height: 1px;
   268→  background: #9ca3af;
   269→}
   270→
   271→.sk-thin-rule {
   272→  position: absolute;
   273→  height: 1px;
   274→  background: #e5e7eb;
   275→}
   276→
   277→/* Multi-gradient trick: simulate multiple text lines from a single element */
   278→.sk-lines {
   279→  position: absolute;
   280→  background-repeat: no-repeat;
   281→  background-image:
   282→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   283→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   284→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   285→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   286→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);
   287→  background-size:
   288→    100% 2px,
   289→    78% 2px,
   290→    94% 2px,
   291→    65% 2px,
   292→    88% 2px;
   293→  background-position:
   294→    0 0,
   295→    0 8px,
   296→    0 16px,
   297→    0 24px,
   298→    0 32px;
   299→}
   300→

   302→   MODERN  – blue left accent bar, clean single-column

   304→
   305→.sketch-modern .sk-bar {
   306→  position: absolute;
   307→  left: 0;

   335→   CLASSIC  – outer border, centered header, horizontal divider
   336→   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
   337→

   341→
   342→.sk-header-box {

   418→/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   419→   EXECUTIVE  – solid navy header block, bold white name, horizontal rule

   421→
   422→.sk-navy-block {

   458→   CREATIVE  – purple sidebar + white content column
   459→   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
   460→
   461→.sketch-creative {

   463→}
   464→
   465→.sk-sidebar {
   466→  position: absolute;
   467→  left: 0;

   486→.sk-side-lines {

   488→  background-image:
   489→    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%),
   490→    linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 0, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 100%),

   492→  background-size: 100% 2px, 80% 2px, 100% 2px;
   493→  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px;
   494→  background-repeat: no-repeat;
   495→}
   496→
   497→.sk-main {
   498→  position: absolute;
   499→  left: 26px;
   500→  right: 4px;
   501→  top: 0;
   502→  bottom: 0;
   503→}
   504→

   506→  left: 0;
   507→  right: 0;
   508→  top: 8px;
   509→  height: 4px;

   511→
   512→.sketch-creative .sk-lines {

   515→  top: 20px;
   516→}
   517→
   518→/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   519→   RESIGNATION-PROFESSIONAL  – letterhead with sender + date row
   520→   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
   521→
   522→.sk-sender {
   523→  position: absolute;
   524→  left: 6px;
   525→  top: 7px;
   526→  width: 38%;
   527→  height: 3px;
   528→  background: #374151;
   529→  border-radius: 1px;
   530→}
   531→
   532→.sk-date {
   533→  position: absolute;
   534→  right: 6px;
   535→  top: 7px;
   536→  width: 22%;
   537→  height: 3px;
   538→  background: #9ca3af;
   539→  border-radius: 1px;
   540→}
   541→
   542→.sk-recipient {
   543→  position: absolute;
   544→  left: 6px;
   545→  right: 6px;
   546→  top: 18px;
   547→  height: 14px;
   548→  background-image:
   549→    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%),
   550→    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%),
   551→    linear-gradient(#6b7280 0, #6b7280 100%);
   552→  background-size: 50% 2px, 42% 2px, 36% 2px;
   553→  background-position: 0 0, 0 6px, 0 12px;
   554→  background-repeat: no-repeat;
   555→}
   556→
   557→.sketch-resignation-professional .sk-lines {
   558→  left: 6px;
   559→  right: 6px;
   560→  top: 40px;
   561→  background-image:
   562→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   563→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   564→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   565→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);
   566→  background-size: 100% 2px, 82% 2px, 96% 2px, 70% 2px;
   567→  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px, 0 24px;
   568→}
   569→
   570→/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   571→   RESIGNATION-BRIEF  – compact, centered, minimal
   572→   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
   573→
   574→.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-name-c {
   575→  position: absolute;
   576→  left: 50%;
   577→  transform: translateX(-50%);
   578→  top: 10px;
   579→  width: 50%;
   580→  height: 4px;
   581→  background: #374151;
   582→  border-radius: 1px;
   583→}
   584→
   585→.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-thin-rule {
   586→  left: 15%;
   587→  right: 15%;
   588→  top: 20px;
   589→}
   590→
   591→.sketch-resignation-brief .sk-lines {
   592→  left: 8px;
   593→  right: 8px;
   594→  top: 30px;
   595→  background-image:
   596→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   597→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   598→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),
   599→    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);
   600→  background-size: 100% 2px, 75% 2px, 90% 2px, 60% 2px;
   601→  background-position: 0 0, 0 8px, 0 16px, 0 24px;
   602→}
   603→</style>
   604→

    "content": "     1\u2192<template>\n     2\u2192  <div ref=\"wrapperRef\" class=\"ts-wrapper\">\n     3\u2192    <!-- Trigger button \u2014 styled to match UButton outline xs -->\n     4\u2192    <button class=\"ts-trigger\" :class=\"{ 'ts-trigger--open': isOpen }\" @click=\"isOpen = !isOpen\">\n     5\u2192      <UIcon name=\"i-lucide-layout-template\" class=\"ts-icon\" />\n     6\u2192      <span>{{ currentTemplateMetadata?.displayName ?? 'Template' }}</span>\n     7\u2192      <UIcon name=\"i-lucide-chevron-down\" class=\"ts-chevron\" :class=\"{ 'ts-chevron--open': isOpen }\" />\n     8\u2192    </button>\n     9\u2192\n    10\u2192    <!-- Dropdown panel -->\n    11\u2192    <div v-if=\"isOpen\" class=\"ts-panel\">\n    12\u2192      <p class=\"ts-heading\">Choose template</p>\n    13\u2192      <div class=\"ts-grid\">\n    14\u2192        <button\n    15\u2192          v-for=\"tmpl in templates\"\n    16\u2192          :key=\"tmpl.name\"\n    17\u2192          class=\"ts-card\"\n    18\u2192          :class=\"{ 'ts-card--active': tmpl.name === activeTemplate }\"\n    19\u2192          :title=\"tmpl.description\"\n    20\u2192          @click=\"select(tmpl.name)\"\n    21\u2192        >\n    22\u2192          <!-- CSS layout sketch -->\n    23\u2192          <div class=\"ts-sketch\" :class=\"`sketch-${tmpl.name}`\">\n    24\u2192            <template v-if=\"tmpl.name === 'modern'\">\n    25\u2192              <div class=\"sk-bar\" />\n    26\u2192              <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n    27\u2192              <div class=\"sk-sub\" />\n    28\u2192              <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    29\u2192            </template>\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192            <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'classic'\">\n    32\u2192              <div class=\"sk-header-box\">\n    33\u2192                <div class=\"sk-name-c\" />\n    34\u2192                <div class=\"sk-sub-c\" />\n    35\u2192              </div>\n    36\u2192              <div class=\"sk-rule\" />\n    37\u2192              <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    38\u2192            </template>\n    39\u2192\n    40\u2192            <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'minimal'\">\n    41\u2192              <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n    42\u2192              <div class=\"sk-thin-rule\" />\n    43\u2192              <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    44\u2192            </template>\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192            <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'executive'\">\n    47\u2192              <div class=\"sk-navy-block\">\n    48\u2192                <div class=\"sk-name-white\" />\n    49\u2192              </div>\n    50\u2192              <div class=\"sk-rule\" />\n    51\u2192              <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    52\u2192            </template>\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192            <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'creative'\">\n    55\u2192              <div class=\"sk-sidebar\">\n    56\u2192                <div class=\"sk-side-name\" />\n    57\u2192                <div class=\"sk-side-lines\" />\n    58\u2192              </div>\n    59\u2192              <div class=\"sk-main\">\n    60\u2192                <div class=\"sk-name\" />\n    61\u2192                <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    62\u2192              </div>\n    63\u2192            </template>\n    64\u2192\n    65\u2192            <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'resignation-professional'\">\n    66\u2192              <div class=\"sk-sender\" />\n    67\u2192              <div class=\"sk-date\" />\n    68\u2192              <div class=\"sk-recipient\" />\n    69\u2192              <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    70\u2192            </template>\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192            <template v-else-if=\"tmpl.name === 'resignation-brief'\">\n    73\u2192              <div class=\"sk-name-c\" />\n    74\u2192              <div class=\"sk-thin-rule\" />\n    75\u2192              <div class=\"sk-lines\" />\n    76\u2192            </template>\n    77\u2192          </div>\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192          <span class=\"ts-card-name\">{{ tmpl.displayName }}</span>\n    80\u2192        </button>\n    81\u2192      </div>\n    82\u2192    </div>\n    83\u2192  </div>\n    84\u2192</template>\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192<script setup lang=\"ts\">\n    87\u2192import { ref, computed, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'\n    88\u2192import { useTemplate } from '~/composables/useTemplate'\n    89\u2192import { useDocumentType } from '~/composables/useDocumentType'\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192const { activeTemplate, setActiveTemplate, getTemplatesForDocumentType, currentTemplateMetadata } = useTemplate()\n    92\u2192const { activeDocumentType } = useDocumentType()\n    93\u2192\n    94\u2192const isOpen = ref(false)\n    95\u2192const wrapperRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192const templates = computed(() => getTemplatesForDocumentType(activeDocumentType.value))\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192function select(name: string) {\n   100\u2192  setActiveTemplate(name)\n   101\u2192  isOpen.value = false\n   102\u2192}\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192function onDocumentClick(event: MouseEvent) {\n   105\u2192  if (wrapperRef.value && !wrapperRef.value.contains(event.target as Node)) {\n   106\u2192    isOpen.value = false\n   107\u2192  }\n   108\u2192}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192onMounted(() => document.addEventListener('mousedown', onDocumentClick))\n   111\u2192onUnmounted(() => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onDocumentClick))\n   112\u2192</script>\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192<style scoped>\n   115\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Wrapper \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192.ts-wrapper {\n   118\u2192  position: relative;\n   119\u2192  display: inline-block;\n   120\u2192}\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Trigger \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192.ts-trigger {\n   125\u2192  display: inline-flex;\n   126\u2192  align-items: center;\n   127\u2192  gap: 5px;\n   128\u2192  padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem;\n   129\u2192  font-size: 0.75rem;\n   130\u2192  font-weight: 500;\n   131\u2192  line-height: 1.25rem;\n   132\u2192  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;\n   133\u2192  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n   134\u2192  background: transparent;\n   135\u2192  color: #374151;\n   136\u2192  cursor: pointer;\n   137\u2192  transition: background-color 0.1s, border-color 0.1s;\n   138\u2192  white-space: nowrap;\n   139\u2192}\n   140\u2192\n   141\u2192.ts-trigger:hover,\n   142\u2192.ts-trigger--open {\n   143\u2192  background: #f9fafb;\n   144\u2192  border-color: #d1d5db;\n   145\u2192}\n   146\u2192\n   147\u2192.ts-icon {\n   148\u2192  width: 13px;\n   149\u2192  height: 13px;\n   150\u2192  opacity: 0.7;\n   151\u2192  flex-shrink: 0;\n   152\u2192}\n   153\u2192\n   154\u2192.ts-chevron {\n   155\u2192  width: 11px;\n   156\u2192  height: 11px;\n   157\u2192  opacity: 0.5;\n   158\u2192  flex-shrink: 0;\n   159\u2192  transition: transform 0.15s;\n   160\u2192}\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192.ts-chevron--open {\n   163\u2192  transform: rotate(180deg);\n   164\u2192}\n   165\u2192\n   166\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Panel \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192.ts-panel {\n   169\u2192  position: absolute;\n   170\u2192  right: 0;\n   171\u2192  top: calc(100% + 6px);\n   172\u2192  z-index: 50;\n   173\u2192  padding: 12px;\n   174\u2192  min-width: 292px;\n   175\u2192  background: #fff;\n   176\u2192  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;\n   177\u2192  border-radius: 0.5rem;\n   178\u2192  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n   179\u2192}\n   180\u2192\n   181\u2192.ts-heading {\n   182\u2192  font-size: 10px;\n   183\u2192  font-weight: 600;\n   184\u2192  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n   185\u2192  text-transform: uppercase;\n   186\u2192  color: #9ca3af;\n   187\u2192  margin: 0 0 10px 0;\n   188\u2192}\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Card grid \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192.ts-grid {\n   193\u2192  display: grid;\n   194\u2192  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n   195\u2192  gap: 8px;\n   196\u2192}\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Individual card \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192.ts-card {\n   201\u2192  display: flex;\n   202\u2192  flex-direction: column;\n   203\u2192  align-items: center;\n   204\u2192  gap: 6px;\n   205\u2192  padding: 7px;\n   206\u2192  border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;\n   207\u2192  border-radius: 8px;\n   208\u2192  background: #fff;\n   209\u2192  cursor: pointer;\n   210\u2192  transition: border-color 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease;\n   211\u2192  text-align: center;\n   212\u2192}\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192.ts-card:hover {\n   215\u2192  border-color: #9ca3af;\n   216\u2192  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n   217\u2192}\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192.ts-card--active {\n   220\u2192  border-color: #0f6fec;\n   221\u2192  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #0f6fec;\n   222\u2192}\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192.ts-card-name {\n   225\u2192  font-size: 10px;\n   226\u2192  font-weight: 500;\n   227\u2192  color: #4b5563;\n   228\u2192  line-height: 1;\n   229\u2192}\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192.ts-card--active .ts-card-name {\n   232\u2192  color: #0f6fec;\n   233\u2192  font-weight: 600;\n   234\u2192}\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192/* \u2500\u2500 Sketch container \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 */\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192.ts-sketch {\n   239\u2192  width: 72px;\n   240\u2192  height: 88px;\n   241\u2192  border-radius: 3px;\n   242\u2192  overflow: hidden;\n   243\u2192  position: relative;\n   244\u2192  background: #fff;\n   245\u2192  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;\n   246\u2192  flex-shrink: 0;\n   247\u2192}\n   248\u2192\n   249\u2192/* \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n   250\u2192   SHARED SKETCH PRIMITIVES\n   251\u2192   \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 */\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192.sk-name {\n   254\u2192  position: absolute;\n   255\u2192  border-radius: 1px;\n   256\u2192  background: #374151;\n   257\u2192}\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192.sk-sub {\n   260\u2192  position: absolute;\n   261\u2192  border-radius: 1px;\n   262\u2192  background: #9ca3af;\n   263\u2192}\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192.sk-rule {\n   266\u2192  position: absolute;\n   267\u2192  height: 1px;\n   268\u2192  background: #9ca3af;\n   269\u2192}\n   270\u2192\n   271\u2192.sk-thin-rule {\n   272\u2192  position: absolute;\n   273\u2192  height: 1px;\n   274\u2192 absolute;\n   280\u2192  background-repeat: no-repeat;\n   281\u2192  background-image:\n   282\u2192    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n   283\u2192    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n   284\u2192    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n   285\u2192    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%),\n   286\u2192    linear-gradient(#d1d5db 0, #d1d5db 100%);\n   287\u2192  background-size:\n   288\u2192    100% 2px,\n   289\u2192    78% 2px,\n   290\u2192    94% 2px,\n   291\u2192    65% 2px,\n   292\u2192    88% 2px;\n   293\u2192  background-position:\n   294\u2192 \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 USERMESSAGE #33
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→/**
     2→ * Document Type Registry Composable
     3→ *
     4→ * Manages the registry of supported document types and the currently active
     5→ * document type. Each document type bundles its own parser, validator,
     6→ * available templates, and sample XML path.
     7→ *
     8→ * Architecture note: this composable is the single source of truth for
     9→ * "what document type am I editing right now?" All other composables and
    10→ * components that need type-specific behaviour should consult it.
    11→ */
    12→
    13→import { computed, onMounted } from 'vue'
    14→import { parseXml as parseCoverLetterXml, validateXml as validateCoverLetterXml } from '~/composables/useXmlParser'
    15→import type { ValidationResult, ParseResult } from '~/composables/useXmlParser'
    16→import { parseResignationXml, validateResignationXml } from '~/composables/useResignationParser'
    17→
    18→const LS_KEY = 'ohmydoc_document_type'
    19→
    20→// ─── Public interfaces ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    21→
    22→export interface DocumentTypeConfig {
    23→  /** Internal key used in URLs, localStorage, and template associations */
    24→  name: string
    25→  /** Human-readable label shown in the UI */
    26→  displayName: string
    27→  /** Short description of the document type */
    28→  description: string
    29→  /** Path to the bundled sample XML (relative to /public) */
    30→  sampleXmlPath: string
    31→  /** Template to activate when this document type is first selected */
    32→  defaultTemplate: string
    33→  /** Names of templates registered in useTemplate that support this type */
    34→  templates: string[]
    35→  /** Parse an XML string into a typed data object for template rendering */
    36→  parse: (xmlString: string) => ParseResult
    37→  /** Validate well-formedness and schema requirements without full parsing */
    38→  validate: (xmlString: string) => ValidationResult
    39→}
    40→
    41→// ─── Registry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    42→
    43→/**
    44→ * All registered document types.
    45→ *
    46→ * To add a new type, append an entry here following the same shape as
    47→ * 'cover-letter'. The parser and validator functions live in their own
    48→ * composable (e.g. useResumParser.ts) and are imported at the top of this file.
    49→ */
    50→const documentTypes: Record<string, DocumentTypeConfig> = {
    51→  'cover-letter': {
    52→    name: 'cover-letter',
    53→    displayName: 'Cover Letter',
    54→    description: 'Professional cover letter for job applications',
    55→    sampleXmlPath: '/samples/cover-letter.xml',
    56→    defaultTemplate: 'modern',
    57→    templates: ['modern', 'classic', 'minimal'],
    58→    parse: parseCoverLetterXml,
    59→    validate: validateCoverLetterXml,
    60→  },
    61→  'resignation-letter': {
    62→    name: 'resignation-letter',
    63→    displayName: 'Resignation Letter',
    64→    description: 'Formal resignation letter to notify an employer',
    65→    sampleXmlPath: '/samples/resignation-letter.xml',
    66→    defaultTemplate: 'resignation-professional',
    67→    templates: ['resignation-professional', 'resignation-brief'],
    68→    parse: parseResignationXml,
    69→    validate: validateResignationXml,
    70→  },
    71→}
    72→
    73→// ─── Composable ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    74→
    75→/**
    76→ * Reactive document type selection.
    77→ *
    78→ * State is shared across all component instances via useState and persisted
    79→ * to localStorage so the selection survives page reloads.
    80→ */
    81→export function useDocumentType() {
    82→  const activeDocumentType = useState<string>('activeDocumentType', () => 'cover-letter')
    83→
    84→  // Restore from localStorage after hydration (client-only)
    85→  onMounted(() => {
    86→    try {
    87→      const saved = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY)
    88→      if (saved && documentTypes[saved]) {
    89→        activeDocumentType.value = saved
    90→      }
    91→    }
    92→    catch {
    93→      // Ignore storage errors (private browsing, quota exceeded, etc.)
    94→    }
    95→  })
    96→
    97→  /**
    98→   * Switch to a different document type and persist the choice to localStorage.
    99→   * Also resets the active template to that type's default.
   100→   */
   101→  function setActiveDocumentType(name: string) {
   102→    if (!documentTypes[name]) {
   103→      console.warn(`Document type "${name}" not found. Available: ${Object.keys(documentTypes).join(', ')}`)
   104→      return
   105→    }
   106→    activeDocumentType.value = name
   107→    try {
   108→      localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, name)
   109→    }
   110→    catch {
   111→      // Ignore storage errors
   112→    }
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  /** Config object for the currently active document type */
   116→  const currentDocumentType = computed<DocumentTypeConfig | undefined>(
   117→    () => documentTypes[activeDocumentType.value],
   118→  )
   119→
   120→  /** All registered document type config objects */
   121→  function getAvailableDocumentTypes(): DocumentTypeConfig[] {
   122→    return Object.values(documentTypes)
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  return {
   126→    activeDocumentType,
   127→    currentDocumentType,
   128→    setActiveDocumentType,
   129→    getAvailableDocumentTypes,
   130→  }
   131→}
   132→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

USERMESSAGE #35
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→/**
     2→ * XML Parser Composable
     3→ *
     4→ * Provides XML parsing functionality using browser's native DOMParser API.
     5→ * Zero dependencies approach for fast, simple XML parsing (DECISIONS.md Decision 6).
     6→ */
     7→
     8→// TypeScript interfaces matching the XML schema from docs/sample/cover-letter.xml
     9→
    10→export interface Address {
    11→  street: string
    12→  city: string
    13→  state: string
    14→  zipCode: string
    15→}
    16→
    17→export interface ContactInformation {
    18→  phone: string
    19→  email: string
    20→}
    21→
    22→export interface Applicant {
    23→  name: string
    24→  address: Address
    25→  contactInformation: ContactInformation
    26→}
    27→
    28→export interface Achievement {
    29→  text: string
    30→}
    31→
    32→export interface Experience {
    33→  employer: string
    34→  achievements: Achievement[]
    35→}
    36→
    37→export interface Letter {
    38→  salutation: string
    39→  introduction: string
    40→  experienceSection: Experience[]
    41→  motivation: string
    42→  closing: string
    43→  signature: string
    44→}
    45→
    46→export interface Recipient {
    47→  position: string
    48→  company: string
    49→  address: Address
    50→}
    51→
    52→export interface ParsedData {
    53→  formatStyle?: string
    54→  applicant: Applicant
    55→  date: string
    56→  recipient: Recipient
    57→  letter: Letter
    58→}
    59→
    60→export interface ValidationResult {
    61→  isValid: boolean
    62→  error?: string
    63→}
    64→
    65→export interface ParseResult {
    66→  success: boolean
    67→  data?: unknown
    68→  error?: string
    69→}
    70→
    71→/**
    72→ * Helper function to safely extract text content from an XML element
    73→ */
    74→function getTextContent(element: Element | null, tagName: string, parentName: string = 'document'): string {
    75→  if (!element) {
    76→    throw new Error(`Missing required element: ${tagName} in ${parentName}`)
    77→  }
    78→  const node = element.querySelector(tagName)
    79→  if (!node) {
    80→    throw new Error(`Missing required element: ${tagName} in ${parentName}`)
    81→  }
    82→  return node.textContent?.trim() || ''
    83→}
    84→
    85→/**
    86→ * Parse address element (reusable for applicant and recipient addresses)
    87→ */
    88→function parseAddress(addressElement: Element | null, context: string): Address {
    89→  if (!addressElement) {
    90→    throw new Error(`Missing address element in ${context}`)
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  return {
    94→    street: getTextContent(addressElement, 'street', `${context} address`),
    95→    city: getTextContent(addressElement, 'city', `${context} address`),
    96→    state: getTextContent(addressElement, 'state', `${context} address`),
    97→    zipCode: getTextContent(addressElement, 'zipCode', `${context} address`),
    98→  }
    99→}
   100→
   101→/**
   102→ * Validate XML for well-formedness and basic schema requirements
   103→ *
   104→ * @param xmlString - XML string to validate
   105→ * @returns ValidationResult with isValid flag and optional error message
   106→ */
   107→export function validateXml(xmlString: string): ValidationResult {
   108→  if (!xmlString || xmlString.trim() === '') {
   109→    return {
   110→      isValid: false,
   111→      error: 'XML input is empty. Please provide valid XML content.',
   112→    }
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  const parser = new DOMParser()
   116→  const xmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(xmlString, 'text/xml')
   117→
   118→  // Check for parser errors
   119→  const parserError = xmlDoc.querySelector('parsererror')
   120→  if (parserError) {
   121→    // Extract meaningful error message from parsererror element
   122→    const errorText = parserError.textContent || 'Unknown XML parsing error'
   123→
   124→    // Provide user-friendly error messages for common issues
   125→    if (errorText.includes('unclosed tag') || errorText.includes('Opening and ending tag mismatch')) {
   126→      return {
   127→        isValid: false,
   128→        error: 'XML has unclosed or mismatched tags. Please check that all opening tags have corresponding closing tags.',
   129→      }
   130→    }
   131→    if (errorText.includes('Unexpected end of file') || errorText.includes('premature end of data')) {
   132→      return {
   133→        isValid: false,
   134→        error: 'XML is incomplete. The document appears to end unexpectedly.',
   135→      }
   136→    }
   137→    if (errorText.includes('invalid character') || errorText.includes('not well-formed')) {
   138→      return {
   139→        isValid: false,
   140→        error: 'XML contains invalid characters or syntax. Please check for special characters that need to be escaped.',
   141→      }
   142→    }
   143→
   144→    return {
   145→      isValid: false,
   146→      error: `XML parsing error: ${errorText}`,
   147→    }
   148→  }
   149→
   150→  // Check for root element
   151→  const root = xmlDoc.documentElement
   152→  if (!root || root.tagName !== 'applicationDocument') {
   153→    return {
   154→      isValid: false,
   155→      error: 'Invalid XML structure. Root element must be <applicationDocument>.',
   156→    }
   157→  }
   158→
   159→  // Check for required top-level elements
   160→  const requiredElements = ['applicant', 'date', 'recipient', 'letter']
   161→  for (const elementName of requiredElements) {
   162→    if (!root.querySelector(elementName)) {
   163→      return {
   164→        isValid: false,
   165→        error: `Missing required element: <${elementName}>. All application documents must include applicant, date, recipient, and letter sections.`,
   166→      }
   167→    }
   168→  }
   169→
   170→  return { isValid: true }
   171→}
   172→
   173→/**
   174→ * Parse XML string into structured data object
   175→ *
   176→ * @param xmlString - XML string to parse
   177→ * @returns ParseResult with success flag, parsed data, or error message
   178→ */
   179→export function parseXml(xmlString: string): ParseResult {
   180→  try {
   181→    // First validate the XML
   182→    const validation = validateXml(xmlString)
   183→    if (!validation.isValid) {
   184→      return {
   185→        success: false,
   186→        error: validation.error,
   187→      }
   188→    }
   189→
   190→    const parser = new DOMParser()
   191→    const xmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(xmlString, 'text/xml')
   192→    const root = xmlDoc.documentElement
   193→
   194→    // Extract formatStyle attribute (optional)
   195→    const formatStyle = root.getAttribute('formatStyle') || undefined
   196→
   197→    // Parse applicant section
   198→    const applicantElement = root.querySelector('applicant')
   199→    if (!applicantElement) {
   200→      throw new Error('Missing required element: applicant')
   201→    }
   202→
   203→    const applicant: Applicant = {
   204→      name: getTextContent(applicantElement, 'name', 'applicant'),
   205→      address: parseAddress(applicantElement.querySelector('address'), 'applicant'),
   206→      contactInformation: {
   207→        phone: getTextContent(applicantElement, 'contactInformation phone', 'applicant'),
   208→        email: getTextContent(applicantElement, 'contactInformation email', 'applicant'),
   209→      },
   210→    }
   211→
   212→    // Parse date
   213→    const date = getTextContent(root, 'date')
   214→
   215→    // Parse recipient section
   216→    const recipientElement = root.querySelector('recipient')
   217→    if (!recipientElement) {
   218→      throw new Error('Missing required element: recipient')
   219→    }
   220→
   221→    const recipient: Recipient = {
   222→      position: getTextContent(recipientElement, 'position', 'recipient'),
   223→      company: getTextContent(recipientElement, 'company', 'recipient'),
   224→      address: parseAddress(recipientElement.querySelector('address'), 'recipient'),
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    // Parse letter section
   228→    const letterElement = root.querySelector('letter')
   229→    if (!letterElement) {
   230→      throw new Error('Missing required element: letter')
   231→    }
   232→
   233→    // Parse experiences
   234→    const experienceElements = letterElement.querySelectorAll('experienceSection experience')
   235→    const experiences: Experience[] = Array.from(experienceElements).map((expElement) => {
   236→      const employer = expElement.querySelector('employer')?.textContent?.trim() || ''
   237→      const achievementElements = expElement.querySelectorAll('achievements achievement')
   238→      const achievements: Achievement[] = Array.from(achievementElements).map(ach => ({
   239→        text: ach.textContent?.trim() || '',
   240→      }))
   241→
   242→      return {
   243→        employer,
   244→        achievements,
   245→      }
   246→    })
   247→
   248→    const letter: Letter = {
   249→      salutation: getTextContent(letterElement, 'salutation', 'letter'),
   250→      introduction: getTextContent(letterElement, 'introduction', 'letter'),
   251→      experienceSection: experiences,
   252→      motivation: getTextContent(letterElement, 'motivation', 'letter'),
   253→      closing: getTextContent(letterElement, 'closing', 'letter'),
   254→      signature: getTextContent(letterElement, 'signature', 'letter'),
   255→    }
   256→
   257→    const parsedData: ParsedData = {
   258→      formatStyle,
   259→      applicant,
   260→      date,
   261→      recipient,
   262→      letter,
   263→    }
   264→
   265→    return {
   266→      success: true,
   267→      data: parsedData,
   268→    }
   269→  }
   270→  catch (error) {
   271→    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error occurred during parsing'
   272→    return {
   273→      success: false,
   274→      error: `Failed to parse XML: ${errorMessage}`,
   275→    }
   276→  }
   277→}
   278→
   279→/**
   280→ * Composable function to use XML parser in Vue components
   281→ */
   282→export function useXmlParser() {
   283→  return {
   284→    parseXml,
   285→    validateXml,
   286→  }
   287→}
   288→
